Executive Profile

Nurul Islam Prince Operations & Business Development

01
About

Systems discipline, applied to growth.

Nurul builds his career at the intersection of operational execution and business development — a combination that shows up rarely, and matters enormously once a company scales past its first few deals. He has spent six years owning both sides: the structured systems that keep a business honest (ERP accuracy, SOP enforcement, KPI reporting) and the outward-facing relationships that keep it growing (C-suite cold outreach, exhibitor sourcing, embassy-level sponsorship negotiation).

That range has taken him from remote operations leadership at a UK-based firm, to booth sales and sponsorship negotiations for international expos in Dhaka, to running outbound pipelines that convert founders into signed development projects. Across every role, the throughline is the same: translate structured systems into measurable commercial impact, and build the kind of executive-level trust that turns a cold introduction into a long-term partnership.

He holds The Credential of Readiness (CORe) from Harvard Business School Online, passed with honors, alongside a BBA from BRAC University — a foundation he pairs with hands-on fluency in HubSpot, Apollo, Clay, and ZoomInfo.

Operational RigorSOP design, ERP ownership, and KPI discipline that closes execution gaps before they become problems.
Executive AccessDirect C-suite and founder engagement, including 3rd-level cold outreach that converts to signed work.
Commercial NegotiationContract, rate, and sponsorship negotiation — including cross-border deals with embassy partners.
Cross-Functional LeadershipCoordinating operations, marketing, and delivery teams toward one shared set of targets.

Professional Experience

An execution record across six organisations.

From remote UK operations management to on-the-ground exhibition sales in Dhaka — a consistent pattern of owning systems and closing deals.

JAN 2026
— APR 2026
Business Development Manager
Masleap INC
  • Executive-Level Engagement: Engaged C-suite founders via 3rd-level cold calling, converting prospects — including Crawford Software and CustomCars.com — into full-scale development projects.
  • Client/Partner Lifecycle Management: Managed discovery through delivery coordination; optimised CRM pipelines across HubSpot and Apollo for tracking, conversion, and visibility.
  • Outbound Operations: Leveraged Clay for data enrichment waterfalls and ZoomInfo for verification, improving prospect list quality.
  • Cross-Functional Bridge: Translated client needs into actionable development plans, aligning stakeholders with technical delivery teams.
APR 2024
— MAY 2025
Operations Manager
Equilibria UK Ltd. · Remote
  • Operational Execution: Owned day-to-day operational and administrative workflows across sourcing, screening, and onboarding functions; closed execution gaps to keep deliverables on schedule.
  • System & ERP Ownership: Maintained partner and candidate records with high accuracy across ERP and tracker systems; flagged inconsistencies and recommended workflow improvements.
  • SOP Execution: Built, documented, and enforced structured SOPs across sourcing, pre-qualification, and onboarding, reducing drop-off through repeatable workflows.
  • Reporting & Oversight: Delivered structured weekly and monthly updates to leadership, maintaining KPI tracking against target profiles and highlighting risks and bottlenecks.
FEB 2025
— NOV 2025
Assistant Manager, Business Development
ExpoNet Exhibition Pvt. Ltd.
  • Exhibition BD & Sourcing: Led booth sales and exhibitor sourcing for the BIID Expo & Dialogue and Marinetech Bangladesh Expo; engaged the Norway and France embassies for sponsorships.
  • Commercial Negotiation: Developed exhibitor acquisition strategies and negotiated terms, pricing, and payment conditions, closing both local and international deals.
  • Team Coordination: Managed operations, marketing, and events teams; tracked exhibitor performance for seamless on-site execution.
2023
— 2025
Senior Business Development Officer
Affirm Business Solutions
  • Department Leadership: Led the BD unit, implementing HubSpot CRM, mentoring junior executives, and securing high-value corporate accounts.
  • Strategic Documentation: Prepared business proposals, MoUs, and investment documents, including RFP/RFI responses and competitor analysis.
2020
— 2023
Business Development Executive → Jr. BD Executive
360 Capital
  • Drove client acquisition and market expansion; prepared investment decks and partnership proposals for corporate and institutional clients.
  • Supported senior leadership in contract negotiations and international outreach, identifying high-value investment opportunities.
2017
— 2020
Jr. Marketing Executive / Sales Associate
Suzuki Bangladesh
  • Supported marketing campaigns, dealership activations, and social media content planning across digital and offline channels.
  • Consistently exceeded monthly sales targets; recognised for a customer-centric approach and team contribution.
